CreateAsp.name: Auto snapshot policy name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must begin with a letter; length 1–65
CreateAsp.timePoints: Time points within a day to take snapshots; valid values: 0–23
CreateAsp.repeatWeekdays: Days of the week to take snapshots; valid values: 0–6
CreateAsp.retentionDays: Retention days for auto snapshots; set to -1 for permanent retention
